fields.name: Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal template that the journal is set up as.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the cost journal batch.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the cost journal batch.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Bal. Cost Type No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the type that a balancing entry for the journal line is posted to.

fields.name: Bal. Cost Center Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the cost center that a balancing entry for the journal line is posted to.

fields.name: Bal. Cost Object Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the cost center that a balancing entry for the journal line is posted to.

fields.name: Delete after Posting
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted journal lines are deleted. If the check box is not selected, you can use the posted journal lines again. After the posting, only the posting date is deleted. You can use the option for monthly recurring cost entries.

fields.name: No. of Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of lines in this journal batch.
